reference: I have probable multiple sclerosis and recently I have been experiencing thoracic pain. I feel lightheaded and have bloating and a lot of gas, and sometimes I become short of breath during these episodes. I also have gastroesophageal reflux and a hiatal hernia. I had an echocardiogram about two years ago, which only showed slight tricuspid regurgitation. I am on Ranitidine, but lately, I feel it is not working. Any ideas?
text: I have probable multiple sclerosis, and recently I have been experiencing thoracic pain. I feel lightheaded and have bloating and a lot of gas, and sometimes I become short of breath during these episodes. I also have gastroesophageal reflux and a hiatal hernia. I had an echocardiogram about 2 days ago, which only showed slight tricuspid regurgitation. I am. Begin, but lately I feel it is not working. Any ideas?
